productLineName: The Color XG 超世代艷彩染髮劑
sourceTitle: Canbran Paul Mitchell brand page, Paul Mitchell Color XG official education pages, professional supplier directions and public product-license references
sourceNote: Paul Mitchell 官方教育頁確認 Color XG 是永久染膏系統，涵蓋灰髮、自然色與冷色表現，並有混合與配方教育；CosmoProf 專業供應商頁公開列出 1:1、10-40 volume、灰髮 20 volume 與依雙氧區分的停留方向。仍需 Paul Mitchell 或肯邦現行官方技術手冊確認台灣規則、色號族群與白髮細節。
notes: Interim product-line option only. Public official pages and professional supplier directions improve the model, but this remains partial because the current Taiwan technical manual and shade-family rules are not confirmed.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1 professional supplier reference; requires official Taiwan manual
conditions: Permanent vegan cream color candidate for Paul Mitchell Color XG services.
Professional supplier directions list 10 volume for deposit/minimal lift, 20 volume for 1-2 levels or optimal coverage, 30 volume for 2-3 levels and 40 volume for 3-4 levels.
warnings: Supplier directions do not replace the Paul Mitchell or Canbran official technical manual.
Developer-specific processing time must be confirmed manually before use.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1 professional supplier reference; requires official Taiwan manual
conditions: Retouch candidate for new growth only.
Select developer by lift need and white-hair coverage requirement, then confirm against official Color XG guidance.
warnings: Avoid overlap on previously colored porous lengths. Confirm official retouch timing.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1 professional supplier reference; grey rules require official manual
conditions: Grey coverage candidate; Paul Mitchell education material positions Color XG for gray coverage and natural/cool tone work.
Professional supplier directions list 20 volume for gray coverage.
warnings: Natural base ratio and resistant grey rules are not verified for this MVP entry.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:2 professional supplier reference; high-lift rules require official manual
conditions: High-lift candidate only after confirming natural base level and official series rules.
Professional supplier directions describe highlifts as using double 40 volume and 45-55 minutes.
warnings: High-lift is risk-sensitive and must remain partial until official high-lift restrictions are modeled.

conditions: Corrective use must be designed after strand testing.
warnings: Color correction cannot use fixed public ratios without official education support.

restrictions: Supplier directions list 25 minutes for deposit/minimal lift; confirm Color XG-compatible developer and current official instructions.

recommendedUse: grey coverage, optimal coverage and moderate lift reference
restrictions: Supplier directions list 35 minutes for 1-2 levels or optimal coverage; confirm white-hair coverage family from official manual.
Supplier directions list 45 minutes for 2-3 levels of lift; avoid high-damage hair and confirm near-scalp limits.
Supplier directions list 45-55 minutes for 3-4 levels and highlifts; high-risk use requires official high-lift rules and senior stylist confirmation.
This Canbran / Paul Mitchell Color XG entry is partial and cannot output precise grams.
Current official Taiwan technical manual, shade family rules, developer rules and product availability must be confirmed before upgrading.
Professional supplier directions are reference data only and must not be treated as Canbran official instructions.
warnings: Use only as a product-line option and directional reference until verified.

sourceTitle: Canbran The Demi campaign page, Paul Mitchell The Demi official education references and professional supplier directions
sourceNote: Canbran 頁確認 The Demi 可用於保鮮、增豔、矯色、色彩校正與灰髮霧化方向；Paul Mitchell 官方教育頁確認 The Demi 為無氨 demi-permanent 快速色彩服務；CosmoProf 專業供應商頁公開列出與 Processing Liquid 等量混合與最多 20 分鐘流程；Pre-Bonded 5-Minute Toners 為獨立快速調色變體。仍需 Paul Mitchell 或肯邦官方手冊確認台灣規則。
notes: The Demi should be treated as deposit/toning/correction and grey-blending direction in the MVP, not a lift or full grey-coverage engine. The 5-minute toner timing belongs to the Pre-Bonded 5-Minute Toners variant and must not be applied to every The Demi shade.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1 with Processing Liquid professional supplier reference; requires official Taiwan manual
conditions: Deposit-only toning, color refresh or shine service candidate after lightening or fading.
Professional supplier directions list equal parts The Demi shade and Paul Mitchell Processing Liquid.
Pre-Bonded 5-Minute Toners are a separate variant for levels 8-10 and should not change general The Demi timing.
warnings: Use only with the correct The Demi processing liquid or developer specified by the official manual.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1 with Processing Liquid professional supplier reference; requires official Taiwan manual
conditions: Cool-tone correction candidate on pre-lightened or faded hair.
warnings: Porous hair may over-deposit; strand test required.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1 with Processing Liquid professional supplier reference; requires official Taiwan manual
conditions: Color glossing, refresh, and tone-balancing candidate.
For porous hair, professional supplier directions reference adding equal parts The Demi Clear and Processing Liquid to the remaining mixture before pulling through.
warnings: Corrective toning must be designed from the real undertone and porosity.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1 grey blending only; requires official Taiwan manual
conditions: Grey blending or soft grey diffusion candidate; Paul Mitchell public article distinguishes full gray coverage from demi-permanent gray blending.
warnings: Do not present The Demi as full white-hair coverage; treat as gray blending/enhancement unless official education confirms a specific coverage technique.

recommendedUse: soft deposit, glossing, toning and grey-blending reference
restrictions: Processing Liquid is listed as low-volume reference data by a professional supplier; confirm current official The Demi instructions before use.
This The Demi entry is partial and cannot output precise grams.
Do not use for lift planning; treat as deposit, refresh, gloss, correction or grey-blending direction only.
Do not apply the 5-minute toner timing to all The Demi shades; it is a variant-specific note for The Demi Pre-Bonded 5-Minute Toners.
warnings: Official The Demi technical manual is required before upgrading to verified.

productLineName: The Color 10 絕彩瞬色白髮染
sourceTitle: Paul Mitchell The Color 10 education page, professional supplier directions and Canbran brand context
sourceNote: Paul Mitchell 官方教育頁確認 The Color 10 是快速白髮服務，提供輕微提淺、最高白髮覆蓋與 10 分鐘處理時間方向；CosmoProf Canada 專業供應商頁公開列出 1:1.5、20V Creme Developer、level 3-7 與 40-60% 灰髮客群方向。仍需肯邦台灣現行供應、官方手冊與色號族群規則確認。
notes: Partial official positioning plus professional supplier directions. Keep blocked until current Canbran Taiwan availability, shade rules and exact mixing instructions are obtained.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1.5 professional supplier reference; requires official Taiwan manual
conditions: Express grey service candidate. Official Paul Mitchell education page confirms slight lift, up to 100% gray coverage and fast 10-minute processing.
Professional supplier Canada directions list 20V Creme Developer and ideal guests with levels 3-7 and 40-60% gray.
warnings: Public official page does not expose full shade-family rules or Canbran Taiwan availability.
Professional supplier data must be confirmed against Paul Mitchell or Canbran official technical material before use.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1.5 retouch reference; requires official Taiwan manual
conditions: Express retouch candidate for time-sensitive guests where official education confirms use.
warnings: Confirm current Canbran Taiwan supply and official processing rules.

recommendedUse: express grey blending or coverage reference
restrictions: Professional supplier Canada page lists 20V Creme Developer; developer and shade family must be confirmed by official technical material.
This The Color 10 entry is partial and cannot output precise grams.
Do not use for exact formulas until current Canbran Taiwan product availability and official manual are confirmed.
warnings: Temporary product option only. Senior stylist confirmation and strand test required.

productLineName: Skylight 手刷漂染專用明度調整粉
sourceTitle: Paul Mitchell official blonding page review, Skylight supplier page and Canbran public product-license reference
sourceNote: 目前公開 Paul Mitchell Pro blonding 頁確認現行金髮/漂染產品線方向，並主推 Pre-Bonded Lightener 與 The Demi Pre-Bonded 5-Minute Toners，但未見 Skylight；Skylight 仍依供應商頁與公開許可資料作候選，需肯邦或 Paul Mitchell 現行官方手冊確認。
notes: Lightener candidate only. Do not upgrade until Skylight current Taiwan supply and official technical manual are confirmed. If Canbran confirms the newer Pre-Bonded Lightener instead of Skylight, add it as a separate product line rather than merging both products.

mixingRules.ratioLabel: 1:1.5 public reference; official Taiwan manual required
conditions: Freehand lightening or balayage candidate; current Paul Mitchell official blonding page should be checked before use because public page did not expose Skylight.
Current Paul Mitchell public blonding direction highlights Pre-Bonded Lightener, so Skylight must be treated as an availability-unconfirmed candidate.
warnings: Lightener work is high risk; official Canbran or Paul Mitchell Skylight manual and strand test required before exact formula.

restrictions: Confirm official developer compatibility and technique.
Monitor lift visually; avoid compromised hair.
High-risk use; avoid scalp-sensitive and high-damage cases.
This Skylight entry is partial and cannot output precise grams.
Do not use on high-damage, repeated-bleach or black-dye-residue cases without senior stylist assessment.
warnings: Skylight was not visible on the current public Paul Mitchell Pro blonding page during this check; confirm current supply and manual before verification.
